# SpeakPath

> AI-powered conversational language practice — speak, get grammar feedback, study the theory, speak again.

SpeakPath is a web application that helps language learners build real conversational fluency through AI-driven voice conversations. Unlike flashcard or grammar-drill apps, SpeakPath puts learners in live spoken exchanges with an AI that listens, responds naturally, and gives targeted grammar feedback after each session. No download required. Free to start.

## What SpeakPath Does

- **Voice-first practice**: Users speak aloud; the AI listens and responds in the target language in real time.
- **Supported languages**: English, Spanish, French, German.
- **Skill levels**: Beginner through Advanced — conversations adapt to the learner's current level.
- **Grammar feedback loop**: After each session, SpeakPath identifies grammar patterns the user struggled with and links directly to theory pages to study the issue — then the user comes back and speaks again.
- **Theory pages**: Free reference content at speakpath.dev/learn covering grammar, key verbs, connectors, phrasal verbs, nouns, and essay structure for English learners.
- **No install needed**: Runs entirely in the browser at https://app.speakpath.dev.
- **Private by design**: Voice recordings are never stored after a session ends.

## How It Works

1. Choose your target language and proficiency level.
2. Start talking — the AI listens and responds naturally in real time.
3. After the session, review grammar mistakes and the exact topics to work on.
4. Study the relevant theory page at speakpath.dev/learn.
5. Come back and speak again — that closed loop is where fluency builds.

## Who It's For

Language learners who already know some basics and want to break through the "I studied for years but can't hold a conversation" plateau. Also useful for travelers, professionals preparing for interviews, and heritage speakers reconnecting with a family language.

## Languages

Practice languages supported in the app:
- English (Business & everyday fluency)
- Spanish (500M+ native speakers)
- French (Romance language, culture, opportunity)
- German (Precision, science, career growth)

The landing page (speakpath.dev) is available in English, Spanish, French, German, and Portuguese.

## Pricing

Free to start. No credit card required.

## Key URLs

- Landing page: https://speakpath.dev
- App: https://app.speakpath.dev
- Theory / Learn: https://speakpath.dev/learn
- FAQ: https://speakpath.dev/faq
- Sign in: https://app.speakpath.dev/login

## About

SpeakPath is an independent product focused on making conversational fluency accessible through AI voice technology.
